rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Glob returned no files and sandbox was constrained to task directory only — code context was not available","scope":"sandbox/execution environment"},{"kind":"decision","text":"HIGH complexity tasks (like auth migrations) trigger the risk gate and pause the pipeline at the plan stage","scope":"pipeline/risk gates"},{"kind":"decision","text":"The @kody command initiates the full pipeline including risk gates and approval stages","scope":"pipeline/kody"}]}
